testcase.name: test_insights_default_user_anonymous

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain premium section assert 'premium' in {'cost_per_egg': 2.68, 'hen_count': 1, 'hen_ranking': [{'age_days': None, 'eggs': 6, 'id': '115f6de6-fa07-4bb2-b57c-5df773fa3092', 'lifecycle': None, ...}], 'is_premium': False, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_stripe_and_auth.py:268: in test_insights_default_user_anonymous assert "premium" in data, "Response should contain premium section" E AssertionError: Response should contain premium section E assert 'premium' in {'cost_per_egg': 2.68, 'hen_count': 1, 'hen_ranking': [{'age_days': None, 'eggs': 6, 'id': '115f6de6-fa07-4bb2-b57c-5df773fa3092', 'lifecycle': None, ...}], 'is_premium': False, ...}
